---
subtitle: "by unit"
---
# Image credits {#sec-image-credits}

## Unit 1

## @fig-romanes-haeckel {#sec-image-credits-romanes-haeckel}

Romanes, G. J. (1892). *Darwin and After Darwin*. Open Court,
Chicago. Public domain. Source:
[Wikimedia Commons](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=823180).

## @fig-vertebrate-brains {#sec-image-credits-vertebrate-brains}

Image components generated by Google Gemini 3.1, on June 30, 2026, in response to author's prompts and then assembled and labeled in Pixelmator Pro and Keynote.

## @fig-blastula {#sec-image-credits-blastula}

Image generated by Google Gemini 3.1, on June 30, 2026, in response to author's prompts. It was revised by OpenAi's ChatGPT 5.5 on June 30, 2026, in response to the author's prompts.

## @fig-embryo {#sec-image-credits-embryo}

Image generated by Google Gemini 3.1, on June 29, 2026, and revised by OpenAI ChaptGPT 5.5 on June 20, 2026 in response to author's prompts.
